en: The LORD reigns; he is robed in majesty; the LORD is robed; he has put on strength as his belt. Yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved.
zh: 耶和華作王，他以威嚴為衣； 耶和華以威嚴為衣，以能力束腰， 世界就得以堅立，永不動搖。

en: Your throne is established from of old; you are from everlasting.
zh: 你的寶座自古就立定， 你從亙古就存在。

en: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their roaring.
zh: 耶和華啊！大水揚起了， 大水揚起了聲音， 大水揚起了澎湃的波浪。

en: Mightier than the thunders of many waters, mightier than the waves of the sea, the LORD on high is mighty!
zh: 耶和華在高處大有能力， 勝過大水的響聲， 勝過海中的巨浪。

en: Your decrees are very trustworthy; holiness befits your house, O LORD, forevermore.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的法度極為確定； 你的殿永遠被稱為聖是合宜的。
